action_mappings.open_payout_recovery_case: open payout recovery case for payout case {}
action_mappings.attach_funding_source_to_case: attach funding source account {} to payout case {}
action_mappings.release_funding_from_case: release funding from payout case {} using funding source account {}
action_mappings.reserve_payment_instruction_for_case: reserve payment instruction {} for payout case {}
action_mappings.release_payment_instruction_from_case: release payment instruction {} from payout case {}
action_mappings.authorize_payment_instruction_for_case: authorize payment instruction {} for payout case {}
action_mappings.authorize_instruction_with_third_party_r: authorize instruction for payout case {} using third party receipt {}
action_mappings.confirm_instruction_with_compliance_cred: confirm instruction for payout case {} with payment instruction {} using compliance credential {}
action_mappings.confirm_instruction_via_execution_profil: confirm instruction for payout case {} via execution profile {}
action_mappings.reserve_internal_ledger_for_case: reserve internal ledger account {} for payout case {}
action_mappings.release_internal_ledger_from_case: release internal ledger account {} from payout case {}
action_mappings.reserve_beneficiary_account_for_case: reserve beneficiary account {} for payout case {}
action_mappings.release_beneficiary_account_from_case: release beneficiary account {} from payout case {}
action_mappings.reserve_external_liquidity_for_case: reserve external liquidity from external liquidity pool {} for payout case {}
action_mappings.release_external_liquidity_from_case: release external liquidity from payout case {} back to external liquidity pool {}
action_mappings.reserve_alternative_rail_option_for_case: reserve alternative rail option {} for payout case {}
action_mappings.release_alternative_rail_option_from_cas: release alternative rail option {} from payout case {}
action_mappings.plan_execution_with_settlement_rail: plan execution for payout case {} using settlement rail {} with internal ledger account {} and beneficiary account {}
action_mappings.plan_execution_with_clearing_pathway: plan execution for payout case {} using settlement rail {} with external liquidity pool {} and clearing reference {}
action_mappings.apply_settlement_policies_to_case: apply settlement policies to payout case {} using internal ledger account {} and beneficiary account {}
action_mappings.approve_and_stage_execution: approve and stage execution for payout case {} using internal ledger account {}, beneficiary account {}, and retry policy {}
action_mappings.grant_approval_with_policies: grant approval for payout case {} using external liquidity pool {}, alternative rail option {}, and settlement policy {}
action_mappings.commence_execution_for_case: commence execution for payout case {} using internal ledger account {} and beneficiary account {}
action_mappings.reconcile_instruction_with_credential: reconcile payment instruction {} with compliance credential {} for payout case {}
action_mappings.mark_instruction_ready_for_execution: mark payment instruction {} ready for execution for payout case {}
action_mappings.mark_instruction_ready_with_third_party_: mark payout case {} ready with third party receipt {}
action_mappings.bind_execution_profile_to_case_variant: bind execution profile {} to payout case {} variant
action_mappings.bind_execution_profile_via_variants: bind execution profile {} via operator case variant {} and automated case variant {}
action_mappings.stage_case_for_execution: stage payout case {} for execution with payment instruction {} and compliance credential {}
action_mappings.finalize_case_settlement_with_bound_prof: finalize settlement for payout case {} with bound execution profile {}
action_mappings.finalize_case_settlement_post_verificati: finalize settlement for payout case {} after verification

action_mappings_indef.open_payout_recovery_case: open payout recovery case for a payout case {}
action_mappings_indef.attach_funding_source_to_case: attach a funding source account {} to a payout case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_funding_from_case: release funding from a payout case {} using a funding source account {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_payment_instruction_for_case: reserve a payment instruction {} for a payout case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_payment_instruction_from_case: release a payment instruction {} from a payout case {}
action_mappings_indef.authorize_payment_instruction_for_case: authorize a payment instruction {} for a payout case {}
action_mappings_indef.authorize_instruction_with_third_party_r: authorize instruction for a payout case {} using a third party receipt {}
action_mappings_indef.confirm_instruction_with_compliance_cred: confirm instruction for a payout case {} with a payment instruction {} using a compliance credential {}
action_mappings_indef.confirm_instruction_via_execution_profil: confirm instruction for a payout case {} via an execution profile {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_internal_ledger_for_case: reserve an internal ledger account {} for a payout case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_internal_ledger_from_case: release an internal ledger account {} from a payout case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_beneficiary_account_for_case: reserve a beneficiary account {} for a payout case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_beneficiary_account_from_case: release a beneficiary account {} from a payout case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_external_liquidity_for_case: reserve external liquidity from an external liquidity pool {} for a payout case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_external_liquidity_from_case: release external liquidity from a payout case {} back to an external liquidity pool {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_alternative_rail_option_for_case: reserve an alternative rail option {} for a payout case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_alternative_rail_option_from_cas: release an alternative rail option {} from a payout case {}
action_mappings_indef.plan_execution_with_settlement_rail: plan execution for a payout case {} using a settlement rail {} with an internal ledger account {} and a beneficiary account {}
action_mappings_indef.plan_execution_with_clearing_pathway: plan execution for a payout case {} using a settlement rail {} with an external liquidity pool {} and a clearing reference {}
action_mappings_indef.apply_settlement_policies_to_case: apply settlement policies to a payout case {} using an internal ledger account {} and a beneficiary account {}
action_mappings_indef.approve_and_stage_execution: approve and stage execution for a payout case {} using an internal ledger account {}, a beneficiary account {}, and a retry policy {}
action_mappings_indef.grant_approval_with_policies: grant approval for a payout case {} using an external liquidity pool {}, an alternative rail option {}, and a settlement policy {}
action_mappings_indef.commence_execution_for_case: commence execution for a payout case {} using an internal ledger account {} and a beneficiary account {}
action_mappings_indef.reconcile_instruction_with_credential: reconcile a payment instruction {} with a compliance credential {} for a payout case {}
action_mappings_indef.mark_instruction_ready_for_execution: mark a payment instruction {} ready for execution for a payout case {}
action_mappings_indef.mark_instruction_ready_with_third_party_: mark a payout case {} ready with a third party receipt {}

action_mappings_indef.bind_execution_profile_via_variants: bind an execution profile {} via an operator case variant {} and an automated case variant {}

action_mappings_indef.finalize_case_settlement: finalize settlement for a payout case {}

predicate_mappings.case_internal_ledger_reserved: {} has an internal ledger reserved in {}
predicate_mappings.case_alternative_rail_reserved: {} has an alternative rail reserved in {}
predicate_mappings.case_third_party_receipt_recorded: the third party receipt for {} is recorded
predicate_mappings.case_execution_in_progress: the execution for {} is in progress
predicate_mappings.operator_variant_execution_profile: {} has an operator variant execution profile {}
predicate_mappings.case_bound_execution_profile: {} has a case bound execution profile {}
predicate_mappings.funding_source_available: {} is available as a funding source
predicate_mappings.internal_ledger_available: {} is available in the internal ledger
predicate_mappings.beneficiary_account_available: {} is available in the beneficiary account
predicate_mappings.automated_variant_execution_profile: {} has an automated variant execution profile {}
predicate_mappings.case_execution_profile_binding: {} has an execution profile binding to {}

open_payout_recovery_case.description: open payout recovery case for a payout case A
preconditions: I can only open payout recovery case for a payout case A if it is not the case that A is open and it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I open payout recovery case for a payout case A, it is the case that A is open

attach_funding_source_to_case.description: attach a funding source account B to a payout case A
preconditions: I can only attach a funding source account B to a payout case A if it is the case that A is open and B is available as a funding source and A is compatible with B
I can only attach a funding source account B to a payout case A if it is not the case that A has funding attached
effects: Once I attach a funding source account B to a payout case A, it is the case that A has a funding reservation from B and A has funding attached
Once I attach a funding source account B to a payout case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a funding source

release_funding_from_case.description: release funding from a payout case A using a funding source account B
preconditions: I can only release funding from a payout case A using a funding source account B if it is the case that A has a funding reservation from B
I can only release funding from a payout case A using a funding source account B if it is not the case that A has an execution planned and it is not the case that A has been granted approval
effects: Once I release funding from a payout case A using a funding source account B, it is the case that B is available as a funding source

Once I release funding from a payout case A using a funding source account B, it is not the case anymore that A has a funding reservation from B and it is not the case anymore that A has funding attached and it is not the case anymore that A has an authorized instruction and it is not the case anymore that A has a cleared instruction and it is not the case anymore that the third party receipt for A is recorded and it is not the case anymore that the execution for A is in progress and it is not the case anymore that A requires reconciliation

reserve_payment_instruction_for_case.description: reserve a payment instruction B for a payout case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a payment instruction B for a payout case A if it is the case that A is open and B is available
effects: Once I reserve a payment instruction B for a payout case A, it is the case that A has a reserved instruction B
Once I reserve a payment instruction B for a payout case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_payment_instruction_from_case.description: release a payment instruction B from a payout case A
preconditions: I can only release a payment instruction B from a payout case A if it is the case that A has a reserved instruction B
effects: Once I release a payment instruction B from a payout case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a payment instruction B from a payout case A, it is not the case anymore that A has a reserved instruction B

authorize_payment_instruction_for_case.description: authorize a payment instruction B for a payout case A
preconditions: I can only authorize a payment instruction B for a payout case A if it is the case that A is open and A has funding attached and A has a reserved instruction B
I can only authorize a payment instruction B for a payout case A if it is not the case that A has an authorized instruction
effects: Once I authorize a payment instruction B for a payout case A, it is the case that A has an authorized instruction

authorize_instruction_with_third_party_r.description: authorize instruction for a payout case A using a third party receipt B
preconditions: I can only authorize instruction for a payout case A using a third party receipt B if it is the case that A is open and A has funding attached and B is available
I can only authorize instruction for a payout case A using a third party receipt B if it is not the case that A has an authorized instruction
effects: Once I authorize instruction for a payout case A using a third party receipt B, it is the case that A has an authorized instruction and the third party receipt for A is recorded
Once I authorize instruction for a payout case A using a third party receipt B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

confirm_instruction_with_compliance_cred.description: confirm instruction for a payout case A with a payment instruction B using a compliance credential C
preconditions: I can only confirm instruction for a payout case A with a payment instruction B using a compliance credential C if it is the case that A has an authorized instruction and A has funding attached and A has a reserved instruction B and C is available
I can only confirm instruction for a payout case A with a payment instruction B using a compliance credential C if it is not the case that A has a cleared instruction
effects: Once I confirm instruction for a payout case A with a payment instruction B using a compliance credential C, it is the case that A has a cleared instruction
Once I confirm instruction for a payout case A with a payment instruction B using a compliance credential C, it is not the case anymore that the third party receipt for A is recorded

confirm_instruction_via_execution_profil.description: confirm instruction for a payout case A via an execution profile B
preconditions: I can only confirm instruction for a payout case A via an execution profile B if it is the case that A has funding attached and A has a case bound execution profile B
I can only confirm instruction for a payout case A via an execution profile B if it is not the case that A has a cleared instruction
effects: Once I confirm instruction for a payout case A via an execution profile B, it is the case that A has a cleared instruction
Once I confirm instruction for a payout case A via an execution profile B, it is not the case anymore that the third party receipt for A is recorded

reserve_internal_ledger_for_case.description: reserve an internal ledger account B for a payout case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an internal ledger account B for a payout case A if it is the case that A is open and B is available in the internal ledger and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve an internal ledger account B for a payout case A, it is the case that A has an internal ledger reserved in B
Once I reserve an internal ledger account B for a payout case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available in the internal ledger

release_internal_ledger_from_case.description: release an internal ledger account B from a payout case A
preconditions: I can only release an internal ledger account B from a payout case A if it is the case that A has an internal ledger reserved in B
effects: Once I release an internal ledger account B from a payout case A, it is the case that B is available in the internal ledger
Once I release an internal ledger account B from a payout case A, it is not the case anymore that A has an internal ledger reserved in B

reserve_beneficiary_account_for_case.description: reserve a beneficiary account B for a payout case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a beneficiary account B for a payout case A if it is the case that A is open and B is available in the beneficiary account and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a beneficiary account B for a payout case A, it is the case that A has a beneficiary reserved in B
Once I reserve a beneficiary account B for a payout case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available in the beneficiary account

release_beneficiary_account_from_case.description: release a beneficiary account B from a payout case A
preconditions: I can only release a beneficiary account B from a payout case A if it is the case that A has a beneficiary reserved in B
effects: Once I release a beneficiary account B from a payout case A, it is the case that B is available in the beneficiary account
Once I release a beneficiary account B from a payout case A, it is not the case anymore that A has a beneficiary reserved in B

reserve_external_liquidity_for_case.description: reserve external liquidity from an external liquidity pool B for a payout case A
preconditions: I can only reserve external liquidity from an external liquidity pool B for a payout case A if it is the case that A is open and B has external liquidity available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve external liquidity from an external liquidity pool B for a payout case A, it is the case that A has external liquidity reserved in B
Once I reserve external liquidity from an external liquidity pool B for a payout case A, it is not the case anymore that B has external liquidity available

release_external_liquidity_from_case.description: release external liquidity from a payout case A back to an external liquidity pool B
preconditions: I can only release external liquidity from a payout case A back to an external liquidity pool B if it is the case that A has external liquidity reserved in B
effects: Once I release external liquidity from a payout case A back to an external liquidity pool B, it is the case that B has external liquidity available
Once I release external liquidity from a payout case A back to an external liquidity pool B, it is not the case anymore that A has external liquidity reserved in B

reserve_alternative_rail_option_for_case.description: reserve an alternative rail option B for a payout case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an alternative rail option B for a payout case A if it is the case that A is open and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve an alternative rail option B for a payout case A, it is the case that A has an alternative rail reserved in B
Once I reserve an alternative rail option B for a payout case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_alternative_rail_option_from_cas.description: release an alternative rail option B from a payout case A
preconditions: I can only release an alternative rail option B from a payout case A if it is the case that A has an alternative rail reserved in B
effects: Once I release an alternative rail option B from a payout case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an alternative rail option B from a payout case A, it is not the case anymore that A has an alternative rail reserved in B

plan_execution_with_settlement_rail.description: plan execution for a payout case A using a settlement rail B with an internal ledger account C and a beneficiary account D
preconditions: I can only plan execution for a payout case A using a settlement rail B with an internal ledger account C and a beneficiary account D if it is the case that A has funding attached and A has an internal ledger reserved in C and A has a beneficiary reserved in D and B is available for settlement rail and A is compatible with B
I can only plan execution for a payout case A using a settlement rail B with an internal ledger account C and a beneficiary account D if it is not the case that A has an execution planned
effects: Once I plan execution for a payout case A using a settlement rail B with an internal ledger account C and a beneficiary account D, it is the case that A has a selected settlement rail B and A has an execution planned
Once I plan execution for a payout case A using a settlement rail B with an internal ledger account C and a beneficiary account D, it is not the case anymore that B is available for settlement rail

plan_execution_with_clearing_pathway.description: plan execution for a payout case A using a settlement rail B with an external liquidity pool C and a clearing reference D
preconditions: I can only plan execution for a payout case A using a settlement rail B with an external liquidity pool C and a clearing reference D if it is the case that A has funding attached and A has external liquidity reserved in C and D is available and B is available for settlement rail and A is compatible with B and A is compatible with D
I can only plan execution for a payout case A using a settlement rail B with an external liquidity pool C and a clearing reference D if it is not the case that A has an execution planned
effects: Once I plan execution for a payout case A using a settlement rail B with an external liquidity pool C and a clearing reference D, it is the case that A has a selected settlement rail B and A has an execution planned and A requires reconciliation and the third party receipt for A is recorded

Once I plan execution for a payout case A using a settlement rail B with an external liquidity pool C and a clearing reference D, it is not the case anymore that B is available for settlement rail and it is not the case anymore that D is available

apply_settlement_policies_to_case.description: apply settlement policies to a payout case A using an internal ledger account B and a beneficiary account C
preconditions: I can only apply settlement policies to a payout case A using an internal ledger account B and a beneficiary account C if it is the case that A has an execution planned and A requires reconciliation and A has an internal ledger reserved in B and A has a beneficiary reserved in C
effects: Once I apply settlement policies to a payout case A using an internal ledger account B and a beneficiary account C, it is not the case anymore that A requires reconciliation and it is not the case anymore that the third party receipt for A is recorded

approve_and_stage_execution.description: approve and stage execution for a payout case A using an internal ledger account B, a beneficiary account C, and a retry policy D
preconditions: I can only approve and stage execution for a payout case A using an internal ledger account B, a beneficiary account C, and a retry policy D if it is the case that A has a cleared instruction and A has an execution planned and A has an internal ledger reserved in B and A has a beneficiary reserved in C and A is applicable under D

I can only approve and stage execution for a payout case A using an internal ledger account B, a beneficiary account C, and a retry policy D if it is not the case that the third party receipt for A is recorded and it is not the case that A has been granted approval
effects: Once I approve and stage execution for a payout case A using an internal ledger account B, a beneficiary account C, and a retry policy D, it is the case that A has been granted approval

grant_approval_with_policies.description: grant approval for a payout case A using an external liquidity pool B, an alternative rail option C, and a settlement policy D
preconditions: I can only grant approval for a payout case A using an external liquidity pool B, an alternative rail option C, and a settlement policy D if it is the case that A has a cleared instruction and A has an execution planned and A has external liquidity reserved in B and A has an alternative rail reserved in C and A is applicable under D
I can only grant approval for a payout case A using an external liquidity pool B, an alternative rail option C, and a settlement policy D if it is not the case that A has been granted approval
effects: Once I grant approval for a payout case A using an external liquidity pool B, an alternative rail option C, and a settlement policy D, it is the case that A has been granted approval and the third party receipt for A is recorded

commence_execution_for_case.description: commence execution for a payout case A using an internal ledger account B and a beneficiary account C
preconditions: I can only commence execution for a payout case A using an internal ledger account B and a beneficiary account C if it is the case that A has been granted approval and the third party receipt for A is recorded and A has an internal ledger reserved in B and A has a beneficiary reserved in C
effects: Once I commence execution for a payout case A using an internal ledger account B and a beneficiary account C, it is the case that the execution for A is in progress

Once I commence execution for a payout case A using an internal ledger account B and a beneficiary account C, it is not the case anymore that the third party receipt for A is recorded and it is not the case anymore that A has a cleared instruction and it is not the case anymore that A requires reconciliation

reconcile_instruction_with_credential.description: reconcile a payment instruction B with a compliance credential C for a payout case A
preconditions: I can only reconcile a payment instruction B with a compliance credential C for a payout case A if it is the case that the execution for A is in progress and A has been granted approval and A has funding attached and A has a reserved instruction B and C is available
I can only reconcile a payment instruction B with a compliance credential C for a payout case A if it is not the case that A has a cleared instruction
effects: Once I reconcile a payment instruction B with a compliance credential C for a payout case A, it is the case that A has a cleared instruction

mark_instruction_ready_for_execution.description: mark a payment instruction B ready for execution for a payout case A
preconditions: I can only mark a payment instruction B ready for execution for a payout case A if it is the case that A has been granted approval and A has a cleared instruction and A has a reserved instruction B

I can only mark a payment instruction B ready for execution for a payout case A if it is not the case that the third party receipt for A is recorded and it is not the case that A is marked for execution
effects: Once I mark a payment instruction B ready for execution for a payout case A, it is the case that A is marked for execution

mark_instruction_ready_with_third_party_.description: mark a payout case A ready with a third party receipt B
preconditions: I can only mark a payout case A ready with a third party receipt B if it is the case that A has been granted approval and A has a cleared instruction and B is available
I can only mark a payout case A ready with a third party receipt B if it is not the case that the third party receipt for A is recorded and it is not the case that A is marked for execution
effects: Once I mark a payout case A ready with a third party receipt B, it is the case that A is marked for execution
Once I mark a payout case A ready with a third party receipt B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

bind_execution_profile_to_case_variant.description: bind an execution profile B to a payout case A variant
preconditions: I can only bind an execution profile B to a payout case A variant if it is the case that A is marked for execution and B is available and A has an execution profile binding to B
effects: Once I bind an execution profile B to a payout case A variant, it is the case that A has an automated variant execution profile B
Once I bind an execution profile B to a payout case A variant, it is not the case anymore that B is available

bind_execution_profile_via_variants.description: bind an execution profile C via an operator case variant A and an automated case variant B
preconditions: I can only bind an execution profile C via an operator case variant A and an automated case variant B if it is the case that A is open and A has an operator variant and A has an operator variant execution profile C and B has an automated variant execution profile C
I can only bind an execution profile C via an operator case variant A and an automated case variant B if it is not the case that A has a case bound execution profile C
effects: Once I bind an execution profile C via an operator case variant A and an automated case variant B, it is the case that A has a case bound execution profile C

stage_case_for_execution.description: stage a payout case A for execution with a payment instruction B and a compliance credential C
preconditions: I can only stage a payout case A for execution with a payment instruction B and a compliance credential C if it is the case that A is open and A has an operator variant and A has a cleared instruction and A is marked for execution and A has a reserved instruction B and C is available
I can only stage a payout case A for execution with a payment instruction B and a compliance credential C if it is not the case that A is staged for execution
effects: Once I stage a payout case A for execution with a payment instruction B and a compliance credential C, it is the case that A is staged for execution

finalize_case_settlement.description: finalize settlement for a payout case A
preconditions: I can only finalize settlement for a payout case A if it is the case that A has an automated variant and A is open and A has funding attached and A has an execution planned and A has been granted approval and A is marked for execution and A has a cleared instruction
I can only finalize settlement for a payout case A if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize settlement for a payout case A, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_case_settlement_with_bound_prof.description: finalize settlement for a payout case A with bound an execution profile B
preconditions: I can only finalize settlement for a payout case A with bound an execution profile B if it is the case that A has an operator variant and A is open and A has funding attached and A has an execution planned and A has been granted approval and A is marked for execution and A has a cleared instruction and A has a case bound execution profile B
I can only finalize settlement for a payout case A with bound an execution profile B if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize settlement for a payout case A with bound an execution profile B, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_case_settlement_post_verificati.description: finalize settlement for a payout case A after verification
preconditions: I can only finalize settlement for a payout case A after verification if it is the case that A has an operator variant and A is open and A has funding attached and A has an execution planned and A has been granted approval and A is marked for execution and A has a cleared instruction and A is staged for execution
I can only finalize settlement for a payout case A after verification if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize settlement for a payout case A after verification, it is the case that A is finalized

action_nl_templates.open_payout_recovery_case: open payout recovery case for payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates.attach_funding_source_to_case: attach funding source account {?funding_source_account} to payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates.release_funding_from_case: release funding from payout case {?payout_case} using funding source account {?funding_source_account}
action_nl_templates.reserve_payment_instruction_for_case: reserve payment instruction {?payment_instruction} for payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates.release_payment_instruction_from_case: release payment instruction {?payment_instruction} from payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates.authorize_payment_instruction_for_case: authorize payment instruction {?payment_instruction} for payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates.authorize_instruction_with_third_party_r: authorize instruction for payout case {?payout_case} using third party receipt {?third_party_receipt}
action_nl_templates.confirm_instruction_with_compliance_cred: confirm instruction for payout case {?payout_case} with payment instruction {?payment_instruction} using compliance credential {?compliance_credential}
action_nl_templates.confirm_instruction_via_execution_profil: confirm instruction for payout case {?payout_case} via execution profile {?execution_profile}
action_nl_templates.reserve_internal_ledger_for_case: reserve internal ledger account {?internal_ledger_account} for payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates.release_internal_ledger_from_case: release internal ledger account {?internal_ledger_account} from payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_beneficiary_account_for_case: reserve beneficiary account {?beneficiary_account} for payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates.release_beneficiary_account_from_case: release beneficiary account {?beneficiary_account} from payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_external_liquidity_for_case: reserve external liquidity from external liquidity pool {?external_liquidity_pool} for payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates.release_external_liquidity_from_case: release external liquidity from payout case {?payout_case} back to external liquidity pool {?external_liquidity_pool}
action_nl_templates.reserve_alternative_rail_option_for_case: reserve alternative rail option {?alternative_rail_option} for payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates.release_alternative_rail_option_from_cas: release alternative rail option {?alternative_rail_option} from payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates.plan_execution_with_settlement_rail: plan execution for payout case {?payout_case} using settlement rail {?settlement_rail} with internal ledger account {?internal_ledger_account} and beneficiary account {?beneficiary_account}
action_nl_templates.plan_execution_with_clearing_pathway: plan execution for payout case {?payout_case} using settlement rail {?settlement_rail} with external liquidity pool {?external_liquidity_pool} and clearing reference {?clearing_reference}
action_nl_templates.apply_settlement_policies_to_case: apply settlement policies to payout case {?payout_case} using internal ledger account {?internal_ledger_account} and beneficiary account {?beneficiary_account}
action_nl_templates.approve_and_stage_execution: approve and stage execution for payout case {?payout_case} using internal ledger account {?internal_ledger_account}, beneficiary account {?beneficiary_account}, and retry policy {?retry_policy}
action_nl_templates.grant_approval_with_policies: grant approval for payout case {?payout_case} using external liquidity pool {?external_liquidity_pool}, alternative rail option {?alternative_rail_option}, and settlement policy {?settlement_policy}
action_nl_templates.commence_execution_for_case: commence execution for payout case {?payout_case} using internal ledger account {?internal_ledger_account} and beneficiary account {?beneficiary_account}
action_nl_templates.reconcile_instruction_with_credential: reconcile payment instruction {?payment_instruction} with compliance credential {?compliance_credential} for payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates.mark_instruction_ready_for_execution: mark payment instruction {?payment_instruction} ready for execution for payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates.mark_instruction_ready_with_third_party_: mark payout case {?payout_case} ready with third party receipt {?third_party_receipt}
action_nl_templates.bind_execution_profile_to_case_variant: bind execution profile {?execution_profile} to payout case {?payout_case} variant
action_nl_templates.bind_execution_profile_via_variants: bind execution profile {?execution_profile} via operator case variant {?operator_case_variant} and automated case variant {?automated_case_variant}
action_nl_templates.stage_case_for_execution: stage payout case {?payout_case} for execution with payment instruction {?payment_instruction} and compliance credential {?compliance_credential}
action_nl_templates.finalize_case_settlement_with_bound_prof: finalize settlement for payout case {?payout_case} with bound execution profile {?execution_profile}
action_nl_templates.finalize_case_settlement_post_verificati: finalize settlement for payout case {?payout_case} after verification

predicate_nl_templates.case_internal_ledger_reserved: {?payout_case} has an internal ledger reserved in {?internal_ledger_account}
predicate_nl_templates.case_alternative_rail_reserved: {?payout_case} has an alternative rail reserved in {?alternative_rail_option}
predicate_nl_templates.case_third_party_receipt_recorded: the third party receipt for {?payout_case} is recorded
predicate_nl_templates.case_execution_in_progress: the execution for {?payout_case} is in progress
predicate_nl_templates.operator_variant_execution_profile: {?payout_case} has an operator variant execution profile {?execution_profile}
predicate_nl_templates.case_bound_execution_profile: {?payout_case} has a case bound execution profile {?execution_profile}
predicate_nl_templates.funding_source_available: {?funding_source_account} is available as a funding source
predicate_nl_templates.internal_ledger_available: {?internal_ledger_account} is available in the internal ledger
predicate_nl_templates.beneficiary_account_available: {?beneficiary_account} is available in the beneficiary account
predicate_nl_templates.automated_variant_execution_profile: {?payout_case} has an automated variant execution profile {?execution_profile}
predicate_nl_templates.case_execution_profile_binding: {?payout_case} has an execution profile binding to {?execution_profile}

action_nl_templates_indef.attach_funding_source_to_case: attach a funding source account {?funding_source_account} to a payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_funding_from_case: release funding from a payout case {?payout_case} using a funding source account {?funding_source_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_payment_instruction_for_case: reserve a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} for a payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_payment_instruction_from_case: release a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} from a payout case {?payout_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_instruction_via_execution_profil: confirm instruction for a payout case {?payout_case} via an execution profile {?execution_profile}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_internal_ledger_for_case: reserve an internal ledger account {?internal_ledger_account} for a payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_internal_ledger_from_case: release an internal ledger account {?internal_ledger_account} from a payout case {?payout_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.release_beneficiary_account_from_case: release a beneficiary account {?beneficiary_account} from a payout case {?payout_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.release_external_liquidity_from_case: release external liquidity from a payout case {?payout_case} back to an external liquidity pool {?external_liquidity_pool}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_alternative_rail_option_for_case: reserve an alternative rail option {?alternative_rail_option} for a payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_alternative_rail_option_from_cas: release an alternative rail option {?alternative_rail_option} from a payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.plan_execution_with_settlement_rail: plan execution for a payout case {?payout_case} using a settlement rail {?settlement_rail} with an internal ledger account {?internal_ledger_account} and a beneficiary account {?beneficiary_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.plan_execution_with_clearing_pathway: plan execution for a payout case {?payout_case} using a settlement rail {?settlement_rail} with an external liquidity pool {?external_liquidity_pool} and a clearing reference {?clearing_reference}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_settlement_policies_to_case: apply settlement policies to a payout case {?payout_case} using an internal ledger account {?internal_ledger_account} and a beneficiary account {?beneficiary_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.approve_and_stage_execution: approve and stage execution for a payout case {?payout_case} using an internal ledger account {?internal_ledger_account}, a beneficiary account {?beneficiary_account}, and a retry policy {?retry_policy}
action_nl_templates_indef.grant_approval_with_policies: grant approval for a payout case {?payout_case} using an external liquidity pool {?external_liquidity_pool}, an alternative rail option {?alternative_rail_option}, and a settlement policy {?settlement_policy}
action_nl_templates_indef.commence_execution_for_case: commence execution for a payout case {?payout_case} using an internal ledger account {?internal_ledger_account} and a beneficiary account {?beneficiary_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.reconcile_instruction_with_credential: reconcile a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} with a compliance credential {?compliance_credential} for a payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_instruction_ready_for_execution: mark a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} ready for execution for a payout case {?payout_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_instruction_ready_with_third_party_: mark a payout case {?payout_case} ready with a third party receipt {?third_party_receipt}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_execution_profile_to_case_variant: bind an execution profile {?execution_profile} to a payout case {?payout_case} variant
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_execution_profile_via_variants: bind an execution profile {?execution_profile} via an operator case variant {?operator_case_variant} and an automated case variant {?automated_case_variant}
action_nl_templates_indef.stage_case_for_execution: stage a payout case {?payout_case} for execution with a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} and a compliance credential {?compliance_credential}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_case_settlement: finalize settlement for a payout case {?payout_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_case_settlement_post_verificati: finalize settlement for a payout case {?payout_case} after verification

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a entity is also a object

Everything that is a payout case or a funding source account or a settlement rail or a beneficiary account or a internal ledger account or a external liquidity pool or a payment instruction or a third party receipt or a execution profile or a compliance credential or a clearing reference or a alternative rail option or a operational policy is also a entity
Everything that is a retry policy or a settlement policy is also a operational policy
Everything that is a automated case variant or a operator case variant is also a payout case
